title: NEW GPT 5.2 AI Good For TradingView Strategies? (watch ASAP)
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: That's right guys, OpenAI released yet another model, Chatchapiti 5.2, and I've tested it for trading strategies for you guys, so you know exactly where this model is good and where it's still.
And spoiler alert, yes, it is able to solve a problem that no other AI can, and I will show you exactly what that is in this video.
And yes, it will be mega beneficial for you guys.
Can this AI convert an indicator into a trading strategy?
Can it improve a trading strategy?
Okay, can it also come up with a completely new trading strategy from the scratch?
I want to tickle its senses, right?
There is some knowledge in there, right?
There is some awesome trading strategy, and I want to surface it with this question, yes.
And then also, can it find the source code of a closed source indicator?
